recent_projects.name: databricks-labs-lakebridge
recent_projects.summary: Fast and predictable migrations to Databricks Lakehouse Platform. This tool is designed to help you migrate your data and workloads to the Databricks Lakehouse Platform in a fast, predictable, and reliable way. It provides a set of tools and utilities to help you reconcile your data and workloads, assess your current state, and plan your migration.

recent_projects.name: data-ingestion-sdk
recent_projects.summary: Python SDK for the Data Ingestion API

recent_projects.name: chilo-api
recent_projects.summary: Chilo is a lightweight, form-meets-function, opinionated (yet highly configurable) api framework.

recent_projects.name: workflows-mcp
recent_projects.summary: MCP server for DAG-based workflow execution with YAML definitions and LLM collaboration

recent_projects.name: hydra-slurm-rich-launcher
recent_projects.summary: A rich, visual interface for easily starting and monitoring your Hydra applications on SLURM clusters

recent_projects.name: openforis-whisp
recent_projects.summary: Whisp (What is in that plot) is an open-source solution which helps to produce relevant forest monitoring information and support compliance with deforestation-related regulations.

recent_no_license_projects.name: databricks-labs-lakebridge
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Fast and predictable migrations to Databricks Lakehouse Platform. This tool is designed to help you migrate your data and workloads to the Databricks Lakehouse Platform in a fast, predictable, and reliable way. It provides a set of tools and utilities to help you reconcile your data and workloads, assess your current state, and plan your migration.

recent_no_license_projects.name: dragohan-grimoire
recent_no_license_projects.summary: AI Automation Grimoire - JSON, files & HTTP requests made dead simple

recent_no_license_projects.name: openjd-sessions
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Provides a library that can be used to build a runtime that is able to run Jobs in a Session as defined by Open Job Description.

recent_no_license_projects.name: catocli
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Cato Networks cli wrapper for the GraphQL API.

recent_no_license_projects.name: hassette
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Hassette is a simple, modern, async-first Python framework for building Home Assistant automations.

recent_bad_license_projects.name: runestone
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: Sphinx extensions for writing interactive documents.

recent_bad_license_projects.name: movie-barcodes
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: Compress every frame of a movie in a single color barcode. Transform entire movies into stunning single-barcode visualizations. Capture the essence of cinematic storytelling through dominant color extraction from each frame.
